testcase.name: test_onboarding_persists_language_on_user_doc

failure.message: AssertionError: language NOT mirrored on user doc (got None). Spec says: 'OnboardingPayload accepte language et le persiste sur user doc' assert None == 'en' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc4fcf5dbbc0>('language') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc4fcf5dbbc0> = {'auth_provider': 'email_code', 'company_name': '', 'created_at': '2026-06-27T14:04:28.756571+00:00', 'email': 'test_iter59_e698edb818@example.com', ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_59.py:83: in test_onboarding_persists_language_on_user_doc assert me_body.get("language") == "en", ( E AssertionError: language NOT mirrored on user doc (got None). Spec says: 'OnboardingPayload accepte language et le persiste sur user doc' E assert None == 'en' E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc4fcf5dbbc0>('language') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc4fcf5dbbc0> = {'auth_provider': 'email_code', 'company_name': '', 'created_at': '2026-06-27T14:04:28.756571+00:00', 'email': 'test_iter59_e698edb818@example.com', ...}.get
